title: Phase 1: Create internal/subtree
description: Move Subtree, SubtreeArena, SubtreeHeapData, SubtreeFlags, FirstLeaf, SubtreeID, SubtreeZero, and all 50+ Get*/Is*/Set* accessor functions from root subtree.go and subtree_edit.go into internal/subtree/. Update internal/stack and internal/parser to import internal/subtree instead of the root package. Add temporary type aliases in root package so grammar tables/scanners/tests still compile. Include subtree_test.go in the new package. This is the biggest phase — everything else depends on it. See docs/package-restructure-design.md Phase 1.
